boundary: Read-only public-source snapshot. No composite Germany score. Working policy models are not official findings.

systems.title: Truth Layer: Kindergeld-Zuschreibung
systems.question: Wer beschloss die Erhöhung des Kindergelds auf 259 Euro?
systems.summary: Der Bundestag beschloss die Erhöhung am 19. Dezember 2024; sie trat am 1. Januar 2026 in Kraft. Die Merz-Regierung begann am 6. Mai 2025.
systems.truth_state: Four live official originals retained and hashed; named human publication review still pending.
incentives: Political communication is rewarded for claiming visible benefits at implementation time.
A source-first timeline reduces attribution errors.
risks: Implementation may be confused with authorship
A narrow claim may be generalized beyond its scope

outcome_contract.metric: Correct attribution before and after reading

systems.title: Bürgerkapital
systems.question: Wie kann jeder Bürger produktives Kapital besitzen?
systems.summary: Automatic low-cost, globally diversified citizen accounts could broaden ownership while preserving individual property rights.
systems.truth_state: Current reform direction and product rules require case-level source acquisition before publication.
incentives: Progressive public contributions target unequal starting conditions
Low fees reward long holding periods
beneficiaries: Children and households without existing financial assets
payers: Account holders through market risk and fees
risks: Unequal take-up if enrolment is voluntary

outcome_contract.metric: Share of adults with diversified productive capital

systems.title: Saubere, günstige Energie
systems.question: Schließt Deutschland die Lücke zu reichlich sauberer und günstiger Energie?
systems.summary: Renewable capacity is growing, but onshore and offshore wind remain well below 2030 targets and grid, storage and flexibility must scale with generation.
systems.truth_state: Official 2025 capacity and generation snapshots; price and system-cost outcome layer remains incomplete.
beneficiaries: Households and firms if system costs fall
payers: Ratepayers and taxpayers financing networks and support schemes

outcome_contract.metric: Delivered clean electricity cost, reliability and target-gap closure

systems.title: Staat als Ankerkunde
systems.question: Kann öffentliche Beschaffung Innovation schneller in reale Nutzung bringen?
systems.summary: Paid discovery contracts, explicit baselines and scale-or-stop gates can turn public demand into measurable innovation rather than grant theatre.
systems.truth_state: Public procurement infrastructure exists; outcome evidence must be gathered pilot by pilot.
incentives: Paid discovery rewards solving concrete problems
beneficiaries: Start-ups and SMEs with working products

outcome_contract.metric: Cost, time, error rate and user outcome versus baseline

systems.title: AI- und Robotik-Dividende
systems.question: Wie werden Produktivitätsgewinne breit geteilt?
systems.summary: AI and robotics should raise output and reduce harmful work, while ownership, profit-sharing and learning access distribute the gains.
systems.truth_state: Normative system design; requires sector-specific pilots and measured productivity data.
incentives: Worker ownership links automation gains to household wealth
Public adoption can create reference customers
beneficiaries: Workers with better tools and ownership
Patients and citizens when human time is freed

outcome_contract.metric: Productivity gain, wage gain, work quality and ownership distribution
outcome_contract.review_horizon: six and twelve months after deployment

cases.title: Wer hat die Kindergelderhöhung auf 259 Euro beschlossen?
cases.truth_layer: Four live official originals, immutable receipts and vault-backed claims.
cases.incentive_layer: Political credit is often claimed at implementation time; timeline evidence disciplines attribution.
cases.outcome_layer: Reader understanding study not yet completed.

indicators.title: Reales BIP-Wachstum 2026
indicators.why_it_matters: Growth creates fiscal room and income, but its distribution and environmental quality matter.

indicators.title: Geschätztes Potenzialwachstum
indicators.why_it_matters: Low potential growth limits durable wage, revenue and service improvements.

indicators.title: Arbeitslosenquote
indicators.why_it_matters: Employment is a central route to income, participation and skills.

indicators.title: Armutsgefährdungsquote
indicators.why_it_matters: The measure captures the share below 60% of median equivalised income, not material deprivation by itself.

indicators.title: Genehmigte Wohnungen
indicators.why_it_matters: Permits are an upstream signal; completed affordable housing is the final outcome.

indicators.title: Erneuerbaren-Anteil an realisierter Stromerzeugung
indicators.why_it_matters: Generation share shows decarbonisation progress but not total system cost or all energy demand.

indicators.title: Solarleistung
indicators.why_it_matters: Solar is the largest capacity-growth engine; networks, storage and flexible demand determine system value.

indicators.title: Windleistung an Land
indicators.why_it_matters: Onshore wind complements solar but needs faster commissioning and grid integration.

indicators.title: Windleistung auf See
indicators.why_it_matters: Offshore wind offers high utilisation but requires long projects, networks and supply-chain capacity.

sources.title: Deutschland-Prognose: Energiepreisschock treibt Teuerung an und bremst die Konjunkturerholung
16,1 % der Bevölkerung in Deutschland sind armutsgefährdet

layers.question: Hat sie das Leben der Menschen wirklich verbessert?

principles: No composite score that hides trade-offs
Public and restricted data remain separated
